text: ACP mode: ability to send regular prompts and steering messages to the agent, AND send a queued message to the agent's CLI (queue-then-deliver to CLI). Relates to 013.005.009-T (CLI pass-through) and the operator->agent steering/session-prompt channel.

backlogit CLI v1.3.0 'shipment ship' is DESTRUCTIVE/buggy: it archived the parent epic (013-F) whose children were still active, orphaning them (013.005-F lost parent_id), and re-stamped ALL previously-archived items (013.001-004) with the wrong merge commit SHA + status archived. Until fixed, do shipment closure MANUALLY: set task/feature status to done and shipment to shipped via direct text edits (also preserves body sections that CLI move/add strip), record merge SHA on the shipment file, run doctor to verify no orphans. Investigate/report upstream backlogit bug.
